note: V0.2 materializes only fixtures with located candidate evidence. The remaining planned templates stay in the canonical ontology V0.1 fixture plan and are not duplicated here.

fixtures.title: Tử Vi Miếu/Vượng đi cùng hóa cát — candidate transcription

inputFacts.notes: Synthetic canonical facts only; no personal birth data. This scenario deliberately preserves the bundled conditions found in the candidate passage.

fixtures.researchQuestion: Does the located Tử Vi passage support a conditional symbolic capacity-strengthening rule when brightness is Miếu/Vượng and the transformation context is auspicious?
expectedEvidence: Physical-scan cross-check of the located transcription passage.
Source-reviewer determination of whether brightness and transformation polarity can be separated.
School-expert approval or rejection of the proposed capacity mapping and moderate magnitude.
limitations: The passage is candidate-located in a searchable transcription but is not witness-verified.
The proposed symbolic mapping remains non-effective and must not be evaluated.
The passage does not authorize numeric coefficients or a standalone brightness-only rule.
reviewQuestions: Does the physical witness match the transcription exactly enough for doctrinal use?
Is the effect conditional on both Miếu/Vượng and hóa cát rather than brightness alone?
Is capacity the correct ApexVoid symbolic dimension, or should the candidate mapping be rejected?
Should the candidate remain shared or be split into school-specific interpretations?
fixtures.rationale: This is the only V0.2 fixture with a located candidate passage. It is research-ready for source checking, not reviewable for approval and not an approved answer.
